feature.name: Cache eviction core
feature.description: Extract LRUCache, TTLCache, and LFUCache eviction policies, TTL expiry with injectable timers, and cached decorator key helpers without importing cachetools.
included_behaviors: LRU eviction order with touch-on-get and maxsize enforcement
LFU frequency buckets and least-frequent eviction
TTL expiry with injectable timer and doubly-linked expiry list
cached decorator memoization with optional cache_info hits/misses
hashkey and typedkey cache key functions for decorator kwargs and types
excluded_behaviors: async caches, cachedmethod, func.lru_cache wrappers, and TLRUCache
upstream benchmarks, docs, tests, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Cache classes couple base size accounting, per-policy auxiliary structures (OrderedDict touch order, LFU frequency links, TTL expiry ring), injectable timer state, and decorator key hashing.
signals: LRU __touch moves OrderedDict keys on every cache hit
LFU _Link nodes bucket keys by frequency with relinking on access
TTLCache expire() walks doubly-linked list against monotonic timer
cached/_cached.py branches on lock, condition, and info wrappers
keys._HashedTuple caches hash for repeated decorator lookups

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import LRUCache, TTLCache, LFUCache, cached, hashkey, typedkey
